title: Stone Crude Age  - (HardRock TFC)
description: This mod is a new craft first basic tools and materials used for recipes. New started Vanilla game.
body:
======================================================

### **This mod is a new system craft first basic tools and materials used for recipes.**

- Here you will find, among others: better use of plant fibers
- You will obtain plant fibers from the grass
- They will be used to create plant string, plant mesh, plant rope
- Flint will be used to make the first flint tools
- flint knife, flint shears, and from stone - stone hammer.

> It was unrealistic for me to use a pickaxe made of wood or even stone, such tools do not exist, so this mod makes the initial phase of the game a little more difficult - instead of an axe, you have to use a flint hatchet, and instead of non-metal pickaxes, craft a Stone Hammer that will extract stone and the first ores metals. this mod completely disables some vanilla wooden and stone tools, replacing them with primitive flint ones.

A basic mod used in my modpacks and as a base for my other mods.
Feel free to use the mod in your mod pack if you miss these elements
if you liked them, or if you need them

![tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gSxy1iXB/images/e292072003e797a1fece14b4255f3f5a277f776d.png)
![craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gSxy1iXB/images/0ef4d420d2b24dbdd618610c12f1fcc817f61d3f.png)
